title: Loom Module Contract
description: Machine-readable interface of a module INCLUDING safety semantics: signals, timing budget, declared failure modes, assume/guarantee predicates, safety level, ODD, and AI metadata.

license.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g. Apache-2.0, MIT, GPL-3.0-or-later). Reference/default modules must be OSI-approved open source; proprietary swaps may use any SPDX id (e.g. LicenseRef-Proprietary). Feeds the SBOM at M5.

safetyLevel.description: ISO 26262 ASIL or QM. Defines the safety line: QM is above-line (free swap); ASIL-* is below-line (gated swap).

deadlineMs.description: Worst-case compute budget within the period.

resource.description: Compute resource (core/zonal-ECU) this module is allocated to. Modules sharing a resource must have total utilization (sum of deadline/period) <= 1. Omit to assume an independently-scheduled resource.

failureModes.description: Declared, machine-readable failure modes; feed FMEA + runtime monitors.

detect.description: Safe-eval predicate evaluated against signals + plant ground truth.

assume.description: Preconditions this module needs from the rest of the system.

guarantee.description: What this module promises if its assumptions hold.

ai.description: Present only for AI/ML modules (ISO/PAS 8800 + SOTIF hooks).

sbomRef.description: Relative path to this module's CycloneDX SBOM.

bindings.description: Runtime-monitor variable bindings (M3): variable name -> source. Source is 'signal:<VSS path>' (read from the bus), 'truth:<key>' (plant ground truth), or 'const:<number>'. Used to evaluate failureMode detect predicates live.

unit.description: Unit of the signal value (e.g. percent, celsius).

optional.description: For a required signal: if true, an unresolved producer is a warning rather than an error (the consumer has a safe default).
